'''Tsyk''' was a murky, polluted [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tsyk system/Legends|Tsyk system]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Tsyklen]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1stm}}
